calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Reset To Aug-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 220 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 220, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerks: Melinka/Sajja, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Petitioner: Jesus Armengol aka Jesus Aremengol Hernandez, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Isabel Armengol.
Decree signed in open court.
